name: Homebrew Packages
description: Installs a list of Homebrew packages.

packages.description: Space-separated list of Homebrew packages to install. Both formulae and casks with Linux binary artifacts (e.g. "claude-code") are supported. A specific version can be pinned per package with '@', e.g. "typescript wget@1.21" -- only versions currently resolvable via Homebrew's API are supported (e.g. "python@3.11"), not arbitrary historical versions.

installation_flags.description: Additional installation flags. These would be used as extra arguments to the brew command (`brew install <installation_flags> <package>@<version>`)
